title: Prince Harry Loses Privacy Lawsuit Against Daily Mail Publisher
summary_full: The case brought by Harry and other celebrities against Associated Newspapers was one of several legal battles that the prince has fought against British tabloids in recent years.
summary_public: The case brought by Harry and other celebrities against Associated Newspapers was one of several legal battles that the prince has fought against British tabloids in recent years.
